## Summary

Describe the focused change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Additional validation is described below.

## Security and data handling

- [ ] No credentials, production data, regulated data, or confidential API responses are included.
- [ ] Authentication, authorization, network, logging, pagination, caching, and write-operation impacts were considered.
- [ ] The change remains read-only, or any write behavior is explicitly documented and gated.

## Notes

Include relevant test results, compatibility considerations, and follow-up work.
